products.name: Ray-Ban Aviator Classic Sunglasses
products.description: The iconic Ray-Ban Aviator Classic features crystal lenses and a sleek gold metal frame. With 100% UV protection and polarized lenses, these timeless shades have been a symbol of cool since 1937. Perfect for beach days, road trips, and everyday summer wear.

products.name: Neutrogena Ultra Sheer Dry-Touch SPF 100 Sunscreen
products.description: Neutrogena's Ultra Sheer Dry-Touch Sunscreen offers broad-spectrum SPF 100 protection in a lightweight, non-greasy formula. Dermatologist-recommended and water-resistant for 80 minutes, it's the ultimate summer skincare companion for face and body.

products.name: Havaianas Brasil Logo Flip Flops
products.description: Brazil's most beloved flip flops, crafted from premium rubber with an embossed texture sole for maximum grip and comfort. Lightweight, water-resistant, and available in vibrant summer colors — the ultimate beach footwear since 1962.

products.name: Speedo Women's Endurance Swimsuit
products.description: Built for performance and style, this Speedo Endurance+ one-piece swimsuit offers chlorine resistance, UPF 50+ sun protection, and a secure fit. Whether you're swimming laps or lounging poolside, it delivers comfort that lasts all summer long.

products.name: YETI Rambler 30 oz Travel Tumbler
products.description: Stay cool all summer with the YETI Rambler 30 oz Tumbler. Double-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold for hours. The durable 18/8 stainless steel construction is puncture- and rust-resistant, and the MagSlider lid keeps your drink covered at the beach or trail.

products.name: Oakley Frogskins Polarized Sunglasses
products.description: The Oakley Frogskins combine retro style with high-performance optics. Featuring Plutonite lens material that filters out 100% of all UV rays and Oakley's HDPolarized technology to eliminate glare. Lightweight O-Matter frame for all-day summer comfort.

products.name: The North Face Sundowner Hat
products.description: Shield yourself from the summer sun with The North Face Sundowner Hat. Built with UPF 40+ fabric, a wide brim for full coverage, and a moisture-wicking sweatband to keep you cool during hikes, beach trips, or outdoor festivals.

products.name: Cocosolis Organic Suntan & Body Oil
products.description: A luxurious blend of 7 certified organic oils including coconut, macadamia, and jojoba. Cocosolis Suntan Oil deeply hydrates skin, accelerates natural tanning, and leaves you with a gorgeous golden glow. 100% natural, paraben-free, and cruelty-free.

products.name: Quiksilver Highline Pro 18" Boardshorts
products.description: Designed with surfers in mind, the Quiksilver Highline Pro Boardshorts feature 4-way stretch recycled fabric, a quick-dry finish, and a secure waistband. UPF 50+ protection and an ergonomic fit make them perfect for surfing, swimming, and beach volleyball.

products.name: Rip Curl Eco Beach Towel
products.description: Made from 100% recycled cotton, the Rip Curl Eco Beach Towel is ultra-absorbent, sand-resistant, and quick-drying. Generously sized at 160 x 80 cm with bold surf-inspired prints. Soft, durable, and kind to the planet — the perfect beach companion.

products.name: Herschel Supply Co. Hip Pack
products.description: The Herschel Hip Pack is your hands-free summer essential. Crafted from durable recycled polyester with a water-resistant finish, it features a main zip compartment and a front zip pocket for cards and keys. Adjustable webbing waist strap fits any size.

products.name: Reef Men's Santa Ana Sandals
products.description: Reef's Santa Ana Sandals are crafted for all-day comfort with a contoured EVA footbed, anatomical arch support, and a genuine leather upper. The durable rubber outsole provides traction on wet and dry surfaces — ideal for beach-to-street summer adventures.
